root_cause.text: An off-by-one error in the bounds check within the `decode_dds1` function fails to account for the exact number of bytes being written, allowing an out-of-bounds write to the `frame` buffer.
root_cause.evidence: The patch changes the bounds check `if (frame_end - frame < width + 3)` to `if (frame_end - frame < width + 4)` to ensure sufficient space is available before performing writes up to `frame[width + 1]` (and potentially `frame[width + 3]`).

agent_logs.root_cause_candidate: An off-by-one error in the bounds check within the `decode_dds1` function fails to account for the exact number of bytes being written, allowing an out-of-bounds write to the `frame` buffer.
agent_logs.evidence_points: The patch changes the bounds check `if (frame_end - frame < width + 3)` to `if (frame_end - frame < width + 4)` to ensure sufficient space is available before performing writes up to `frame[width + 1]` (and potentially `frame[width + 3]`).

intent_record.intent_summary: Fix an off-by-one error in the buffer boundary check to prevent out-of-bounds writes.
intent_record.what: Changed the frame boundary check condition from width + 3 to width + 4.
intent_record.how: Prevents potential out-of-bounds memory writes by requiring one additional byte of available buffer space before proceeding with writes.

grouping_result.intent: Fix an off-by-one error in the buffer boundary check to prevent out-of-bounds writes.

relevance_review.reason: The group directly addresses the off-by-one error in the buffer boundary check mentioned in the root cause, which prevents the out-of-bounds write.

candidates.rationale: This bounds check contains an off-by-one error that fails to ensure sufficient space in the frame buffer before writing.

vuln_statements.explanation: This bounds check contains an off-by-one error, failing to ensure sufficient space in the frame buffer before writing, which leads to an out-of-bounds write.

bic_trace_step.commit_msg:
dfa: improve boundary checks in decode_dds1()

Fixes CVE-2012-2798

CC:libav-stable@libav.org
bic_trace_step.code_snippet:
commit d05f72c75445969cd7bdb1d860635c9880c67fb6
Author: Anton Khirnov <anton@khirnov.net>
Date:   Sat Sep 29 13:25:28 2012 +0200

    dfa: improve boundary checks in decode_dds1()
    
    Fixes CVE-2012-2798
    
    CC:libav-stable@libav.org

diff --git a/libavcodec/dfa.c b/libavcodec/dfa.c
index c6f09c89a7..d464acb187 100644
--- a/libavcodec/dfa.c
+++ b/libavcodec/dfa.c
@@ -153,8 +153,7 @@ static int decode_dds1(GetByteContext *gb, uint8_t *frame, int width, int height
             bitbuf = b
bic_trace_step.reason: The diff clearly shows the boundary checks being improved, specifically fixing the off-by-one error by changing 'frame_end - frame < width + 2' to 'frame_end - frame < width + 3' and adding proper bounds checking for the 'v' offset.
